instructions: Muddle mint and sugar with lime juice|Add rum and ice|Top with soda water|Stir gently and garnish with mint
Pull a fresh shot of espresso|Combine vodka coffee liqueur espresso syrup in shaker|Add ice and shake vigorously|Double strain into martini glass|Garnish with coffee beans
Blend pineapple juice coconut cream pineapple chunks ice|Pour into glass|Garnish with pineapple slice and cherry
Pull double shot of espresso|Steam milk until silky microfoam|Pour milk over espresso in circular motion|Optional add sugar

Rim glass with salt|Combine tequila triple sec lime juice ice in shaker|Shake well and strain into glass|Garnish with lime wheel
Blend mango yogurt milk sugar cardamom ice|Pour into glass|Garnish with cardamom powder
Combine coffee and cold water in jar|Stir gently|Refrigerate for 12-24 hours|Strain through fine mesh filter|Dilute with water or milk to taste
Simmer water with all spices 5 min|Add tea leaves steep 3 min|Strain into cup|Steam milk and pour over tea|Sweeten to taste
Blend all ingredients until smooth|Pour into glass|Garnish with strawberry
Muddle sugar and bitters with splash of water|Add bourbon and ice|Stir until well chilled|Garnish with orange peel and cherry
